name: Nutty Cheese Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place the cheese in a baking dish and pour over the ice cream topping.
3. Scatter the nuts on top of the cheese.
4. Bake for about 15 minutes, until the cheese is lightly browned and bubbly.
5. Turn off the heat and let the cheese cool for 1-2 minutes before serving. Enjoy!
